name: cAMP-induced phosphorylation of 26S proteasomes on Rpn6/PSMD11 enhances their activity and the degradation of misfolded proteins
summary: A mammalian-cell and purified-proteasome study showing that cAMP/PKA signaling phosphorylates Rpn6/PSMD11 and enhances degradation of ubiquitinated and aggregation-prone proteins.
venue: Proceedings of the National Academy of Sciences of the United States of America
